task_summary: SP29 made live terminal speech prefer live desk detail/message/status text over stale fixture ghost focus/message copy. Real smoke then showed the remaining freshness limit is upstream: ./mew desk --json currently reports old active sessions and stale focus, so Wisp cannot honestly show the current agent-loop speech until desk exposes fresher work state.

tests_run.command: UV_CACHE_DIR=.uv-cache uv run python experiments/mew-ghost/ghost.py --format human --form cat --watch-count 1 --interval 0
tests_run.result: speech uses live desk detail text, but the real desk detail is stale SP23a work-session focus from task #37
real desk payload reports stale active sessions such as Resume task #37 with stale_for_seconds over 21000

proof_artifacts: real smoke showed live desk stale active session focus
notes: Mew authored the side-project source/test patch with rescue edits 0. Operator accepted the incremental patch but opened issue #31 because the user-facing expectation that Wisp speech changes during the active agent loop depends on core desk freshness, not more side-project fixture logic.
